scenario.title: Cross-PR conflict and overlap detection in a review batch
steps: Enter review mode from a PR inbox notification with a batch of 3 PRs
The ReviewModeService fetches per-PR diff file lists asynchronously
The detectBatchOverlaps algorithm computes pairwise overlap analysis
The queue strip renders overlap indicator chips on affected PR rows (#127, #131 share auth.ts and config.ts)
The review order banner appears at the top of the main area when overlaps are detected
The briefing view shows file-level overlap notes on flagged files shared by other PRs

assertions.description: Overlap detection types (OverlapKind, PrOverlap, BatchOverlapResult, ReviewOrderEntry) are added to the shared IPC contract
The detectBatchOverlaps pure function correctly classifies overlaps as conflict, duplicate, or touching
The ReviewModeService exposes getOverlapResult() and onOverlapUpdate() for reactive UI rendering
The queue strip shows overlap indicator chips with warning styling on affected PR rows
The review order banner appears when overlaps are detected with suggested order and dismissible X button
The briefing view shows file-level overlap notes (e.g. 'also changed by #131') on shared flagged files
i18n keys are added for overlap detection UI (bannerTitle, dismissBanner, fileAlsoChangedBy)
Mock service returns per-PR diff file lists (PRs #127 and #131 share auth.ts and config.ts for overlap detection)
TypeScript strict typecheck passes with no new errors in renderer/shared layers

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence — Cross-PR Overlap Detection (#157)

### Acceptance Criteria Verification

**1. Overlapping changed-file sets are detected and flagged on affected queue items**
— ✅ The `detectBatchOverlaps` algorithm in `src/renderer/src/features/review/detect-overlaps.ts` performs pairwise file-set comparisons across the batch. PRs sharing files get an overlap indicator chip (e.g. "overlaps #42 — review together") rendered below the verdict line in `ReviewQueueStrip`.

**2. The agent flags likely duplicate/conflicting intents with a short note**
— ✅ Overlaps are classified as `conflict` (both PRs add to same file), `duplicate` (Jaccard similarity > 0.6), or `touching` (general overlap). Each pair gets a human-readable note (e.g. "Both modify auth.ts — potential merge conflict").

**3. A suggested review order is offered when overlaps exist**
— ✅ The `ReviewOrderEntry` list sorts overlapping PRs first (highest overlap count), then by risk level. A dismissible `review-order-banner` appears in the overlay header with clickable PR number links.

### Key Files Changed
- `src/shared/ipc.ts` — Added `OverlapKind`, `PrOverlap`, `ReviewOrderEntry`, `BatchOverlapResult` types
- `src/renderer/src/features/review/detect-overlaps.ts` — Pure overlap detection algorithm
- `src/renderer/src/services/impl/ReviewModeService.ts` — Async overlap computation on batch enter
- `src/renderer/src/features/review/ReviewQueueStrip.tsx` — Overlap indicator chips
- `src/renderer/src/features/review/ReviewModeOverlay.tsx` — Review order banner
- `src/renderer/src/features/review/ReviewBriefingView.tsx` — File-level overlap notes
- `src/renderer/src/theme.css` — CSS for overlap chips, banner, and file notes
- `src/renderer/src/services/mock/MockServices.ts` — Per-PR mock diff data with overlapping files
- `src/renderer/src/i18n/en.json` — i18n keys for overlap UI
- `src/visual-evidence/scenarios/gh-157-cross-pr-overlap-detection.ts` — Playwright scenario
- `src/visual-evidence/scenario-registry.ts` — Scenario registration
